baseline.final_answer: Club soda is often considered an effective stain remover for various spills, including beer and red wine. While some people question its efficacy, proper application can lead to successful stain removal. One anecdote describes a founder of Chem-Dry discovering club soda's stain-removing capabilities when a flight attendant used it to clean a stain on his tie.
